member.name: T:Splat.ApplicationPerformanceMonitoring.DefaultFeatureUsageTrackingManager
member.summary: Default implementation of the Feature Usage Tracking Manager.

member.name: M:Splat.ApplicationPerformanceMonitoring.DefaultFeatureUsageTrackingManager.#ctor
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class.

member.name: T:Splat.ApplicationPerformanceMonitoring.DefaultFeatureUsageTrackingSession
member.summary: Default Feature Usage Tracking Session. Used for output when a dev chooses not to override.

member.name: M:Splat.ApplicationPerformanceMonitoring.DefaultFeatureUsageTrackingSession.#ctor(System.String)
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class.
member.param: The name of the feature.

member.name: T:Splat.ApplicationPerformanceMonitoring.EnableFeatureUsageTrackingExtensions
member.summary: Extensions for the IEnableFeatureUsageTracking interface. This is a similar design to IEnableLogger, to allow easy use and extension of classes such as ViewModels.

member.name: M:Splat.ApplicationPerformanceMonitoring.EnableFeatureUsageTrackingExtensions.FeatureUsageTrackingSession(Splat.ApplicationPerformanceMonitoring.IEnableFeatureUsageTracking,System.String)
member.summary: Gets a Feature Usage Tracking Session.
member.param: instance of class that uses IEnableFeatureUsageTracking.
Name of the feature.
member.returns: Feature Usage Tracking Session.

member.name: M:Splat.ApplicationPerformanceMonitoring.EnableFeatureUsageTrackingExtensions.WithFeatureUsageTrackingSession(Splat.ApplicationPerformanceMonitoring.IEnableFeatureUsageTracking,System.String,System.Action{Splat.ApplicationPerformanceMonitoring.IFeatureUsageTrackingSession})
member.summary: Helper for wrapping an action with a Feature Usage Tracking Session.
member.param: instance of class that uses IEnableFeatureUsageTracking.
Name of the feature.
Action to carry out.

member.name: M:Splat.ApplicationPerformanceMonitoring.EnableFeatureUsageTrackingExtensions.WithSubFeatureUsageTrackingSession(Splat.ApplicationPerformanceMonitoring.IFeatureUsageTrackingSession,System.String,System.Action{Splat.ApplicationPerformanceMonitoring.IFeatureUsageTrackingSession})
member.summary: Helper for wrapping an action with a sub-feature Usage Tracking Session.
member.param: instance of class that uses IEnableFeatureUsageTracking.
Name of the feature.
Action to carry out.

member.name: T:Splat.ApplicationPerformanceMonitoring.FuncFeatureUsageTrackingManager
member.summary: Func based Feature Usage Tracking Manager.
member.remarks: Initializes a new instance of the class.
member.param: Factory function for a Feature Usage Tracking Session.

member.name: M:Splat.ApplicationPerformanceMonitoring.FuncFeatureUsageTrackingManager.#ctor(System.Func{System.String,Splat.ApplicationPerformanceMonitoring.IFeatureUsageTrackingSession})
member.summary: Func based Feature Usage Tracking Manager.
member.remarks: Initializes a new instance of the class.
member.param: Factory function for a Feature Usage Tracking Session.

member.name: T:Splat.ApplicationPerformanceMonitoring.IEnableFeatureUsageTracking
member.summary: Interface for exposing Feature Usage Tracking as an extension to a class.

member.name: T:Splat.ApplicationPerformanceMonitoring.IFeatureUsageTrackingManager
member.summary: A manager which will generate a for the specified type.

member.name: M:Splat.ApplicationPerformanceMonitoring.IFeatureUsageTrackingManager.GetFeatureUsageTrackingSession(System.String)
member.summary: Generate a for the specified type.
member.param: The name of the feature.
member.returns: The .

member.name: T:Splat.ApplicationPerformanceMonitoring.IFeatureUsageTrackingSession
member.summary: Base interface for a feature usage tracking session.

member.name: P:Splat.ApplicationPerformanceMonitoring.IFeatureUsageTrackingSession.FeatureName
member.summary: Gets the name of the Feature being tracked.

member.name: M:Splat.ApplicationPerformanceMonitoring.IFeatureUsageTrackingSession.SubFeature(System.String)
member.summary: Starts a sub-feature usage tracking session on the current session.
member.param: Description of the sub-feature.
member.returns: The sub-feature usage tracking session.

member.name: M:Splat.ApplicationPerformanceMonitoring.IFeatureUsageTrackingSession.OnException(System.Exception)
member.summary: Notify the APM toolset an exception has occurred in the current tracking session.
member.param: The exception that occurred.

member.name: T:Splat.ApplicationPerformanceMonitoring.IFeatureUsageTrackingSession`1
member.summary: Generic interface for a Feature Usage Tracking Session.
member.typeparam: The Type for the Unique Tracking References.

member.name: P:Splat.ApplicationPerformanceMonitoring.IFeatureUsageTrackingSession`1.FeatureReference
member.summary: Gets the current Feature Usage Unique Reference.

member.name: P:Splat.ApplicationPerformanceMonitoring.IFeatureUsageTrackingSession`1.ParentReference
member.summary: Gets the unique reference for the Parent Tracking Session, if any.

member.name: T:Splat.ApplicationPerformanceMonitoring.IViewTracking
member.summary: Base interface for tracking view usage.

member.name: M:Splat.ApplicationPerformanceMonitoring.IViewTracking.OnViewNavigation(System.String)
member.summary: Track a view navigation using just a name.
member.param: Name of the view.

member.name: M:Splat.AssemblyFinder.AttemptToLoadType``1(System.String)
member.summary: Attempt to find the type based on the specified string.
member.typeparam: The type to cast the value to if we find it.
member.param: The name of the full type.
member.returns: The created object or the default value.

member.name: T:Splat.PointMathExtensions
member.summary: Extension methods which extend the point mathematics.

member.name: M:Splat.PointMathExtensions.Floor(System.Drawing.Point)
member.summary: Floor the specified point (i.e. round it to integer values).
member.param: The point value to use for the calculation.
member.returns: The point that has been floored.

member.name: M:Splat.PointMathExtensions.WithinEpsilonOf(System.Drawing.PointF,System.Drawing.PointF,System.Single)
member.summary: Determines whether two points are within 'epsilon' of each other.
member.param: The point value to use for the calculation.
The point to compare against.
The tolerated epsilon value.
member.returns: If the value is equal based on the epsilon.

member.name: M:Splat.PointMathExtensions.DotProduct(System.Drawing.PointF,System.Drawing.PointF)
member.summary: Calculates the Dot product of two points.
member.param: The point value to use for the calculation.
The point to perform the dot product against.
member.returns: The calculated dot product.

member.name: M:Splat.PointMathExtensions.ScaledBy(System.Drawing.PointF,System.Single)
member.summary: Scales a PointF by a scalar factor.
member.param: The point value to use for the calculation.
The amount to scale by.
member.returns: The scaled point.

member.name: M:Splat.PointMathExtensions.Length(System.Drawing.PointF)
member.summary: Calculates the magnitude of a point from (0,0).
member.param: The point value to use for the calculation.
member.returns: The length of the point.

member.name: M:Splat.PointMathExtensions.Normalize(System.Drawing.PointF)
member.summary: Normalize the specified PointF (i.e. makes its magnitude = 1.0f).
member.param: The point value to use for the calculation.
member.returns: The normalized point.

member.name: M:Splat.PointMathExtensions.AngleInDegrees(System.Drawing.PointF)
member.summary: Calculates the angle in degrees of a PointF.
member.param: The point value to use for the calculation.
member.returns: The angle that has been generated.

member.name: M:Splat.PointMathExtensions.ProjectAlong(System.Drawing.PointF,System.Drawing.PointF)
member.summary: Projects a PointF along a specified direction.
member.param: The point value to use for the calculation.
The point containing the direction.
member.returns: The projected point.

member.name: M:Splat.PointMathExtensions.ProjectAlongAngle(System.Drawing.PointF,System.Single)
member.summary: Projects a PointF along a specified angle.
member.param: The point value to use for the calculation.
The angle in degrees to perform the projection against.
member.returns: The point that has been projected.

member.name: M:Splat.PointMathExtensions.DistanceTo(System.Drawing.PointF,System.Drawing.PointF)
member.summary: Calculates the distance between two points.
member.param: The point value to use for the calculation.
The other point to calculate distance to.
member.returns: The distance to the other point.

member.name: T:Splat.RectangleMathExtensions
member.summary: Extension methods to help with operations associated with the struct.

member.name: M:Splat.RectangleMathExtensions.Center(System.Drawing.RectangleF)
member.summary: Determine the center of a Rectangle.
member.param: The rectangle to perform the calculation against.
member.returns: The point of the center of the rectangle.

member.name: M:Splat.RectangleMathExtensions.Divide(System.Drawing.RectangleF,System.Single,Splat.RectEdge)
member.summary: Divide the specified Rectangle into two component rectangles.
member.param: The rectangle to perform the calculation against.
Amount to move away from the given edge.
The edge to create the slice from.
member.returns: The set of rectangles that are generated.

member.name: M:Splat.RectangleMathExtensions.DivideWithPadding(System.Drawing.RectangleF,System.Single,System.Single,Splat.RectEdge)
member.summary: Divide the specified Rectangle into two component rectangles, adding a padding between them.
member.param: The rectangle to perform the calculation against.
Amount to move away from the given edge.
The amount of padding that is in neither rectangle.
The edge to create the slice from.
member.returns: The set of rectangles that are generated.

member.name: M:Splat.RectangleMathExtensions.InvertWithin(System.Drawing.RectangleF,System.Drawing.RectangleF)

summary.para: Vertically inverts the coordinates of the rectangle within containingRect.

This can effectively be used to change the coordinate system of a rectangle. For example, if `rect` is defined for a coordinate system starting at the top-left, the result will be a rectangle relative to the bottom-left.

member.param: The rectangle to perform the calculation against.
The containing rectangle.
member.returns: The inverted rectangle.

member.name: M:Splat.RectangleMathExtensions.Copy(System.Drawing.RectangleF,System.Nullable{System.Single},System.Nullable{System.Single},System.Nullable{System.Single},System.Nullable{System.Single},System.Nullable{System.Single},System.Nullable{System.Single})

summary.para: Creates a new RectangleF as a Copy of an existing one.
This is useful when you have a rectangle that is almost what you want, but you just want to change a couple properties.

member.param: The rectangle to perform the calculation against.
Optional new x coordinate of the rectangle to use.
Optional new y coordinate of the rectangle to use.
Optional new width of the rectangle to use.
Optional new height of the rectangle to use.
Optional new top of the rectangle to use.
Optional new bottom of the rectangle to use.
member.returns: The copied rectangle.

member.name: T:Splat.RectEdge
member.summary: Specifies which edge of a rectangle to use.

member.name: F:Splat.RectEdge.Left
member.summary: The left of the rectangle.

member.name: F:Splat.RectEdge.Top
member.summary: The top of the rectangle.

member.name: F:Splat.RectEdge.Right
member.summary: The right of the rectangle.

member.name: F:Splat.RectEdge.Bottom
member.summary: The bottom of the rectangle.

member.name: T:Splat.SizeMathExtensions
member.summary: Extension methods to assist with the struct.

member.name: M:Splat.SizeMathExtensions.WithinEpsilonOf(System.Drawing.SizeF,System.Drawing.SizeF,System.Single)
member.summary: Determines whether two sizes are within epsilon of each other.
member.param: The size we are doing the operation against.
The size to compare for equality.
The tolerated epsilon value.
member.returns: If the value is equal based on the epsilon.

member.name: M:Splat.SizeMathExtensions.ScaledBy(System.Drawing.SizeF,System.Single)
member.summary: Scales a size by a scalar value.
member.param: The size we are doing the operation against.
The amount to scale by.
member.returns: The scaled size.

member.name: T:Splat.DefaultModeDetector
member.summary: Provides a mechanism to detect if the current execution context is a unit test using various heuristics such as environment signals, process names, and legacy assembly scans.
member.remarks: Implements the interface to define mode detection functionality. Implements the interface to enable logging capabilities.

member.name: F:Splat.DefaultModeDetector._testAssemblyMarkers
member.summary: A static array containing known markers of test assemblies. These markers are utilized as part of the detection logic to determine if the current process is running in a unit test environment. Each marker represents a known identifier or namespace commonly used in unit testing frameworks.

member.name: F:Splat.DefaultModeDetector._knownTestHostProcesses
member.summary: A static array containing the names of known test host processes. These process names are used to detect whether the current application is being executed in a unit testing environment. Each entry indicates a common test host or console runner associated with various testing frameworks.

member.name: F:Splat.DefaultModeDetector._exactEnvVars
member.summary: A static array containing exact environment variable names commonly used to identify test runners. Each variable in this list is checked to directly determine whether the application is running in a unit test environment.

member.name: F:Splat.DefaultModeDetector._envPrefixes
member.summary: A static array containing prefixes for environment variable names that are indicative of test runners. These prefixes are used to detect if the current process is executing in a unit test environment by checking whether any environment variables start with these prefixes.

member.name: M:Splat.DefaultModeDetector.IsExplicitTestEnvironment
member.summary: Determines if the current environment explicitly indicates a test environment based on specific environment variables. Explicit env var that users can set in their test setup for deterministic behavior.
member.returns: true if the environment explicitly signals a test environment; otherwise, false.

member.name: M:Splat.DefaultModeDetector.HasTestRunnerEnvironmentSignals
member.summary: Determines if current environment has test runner signals present. Common signals emitted by popular test runners or their hosts.
member.returns: A boolean value indicating whether test runner environment signals are detected.

member.name: M:Splat.DefaultModeDetector.IsKnownTestHostProcess
member.summary: Determines whether the current process is a known test host process by examining the process name and other runtime-specific signals. Last-resort heuristic: detect known test hosts by process name.
member.returns: True if the process is identified as a known test host; otherwise, false.

member.name: M:Splat.DefaultModeDetector.LegacyAssemblyScan(System.String[])
member.summary: Legacy assembly-name scan fallback (avoids LINQ to reduce allocations). Checks if any of the loaded assemblies in the current application domain match the specified assembly markers, using case-insensitive comparison. Typically used as a fallback mechanism for detecting test environments.
member.param: An array of string markers representing partial or full names of assemblies to be matched against the loaded assemblies in the application domain.
member.returns: A boolean value indicating whether at least one of the loaded assemblies matches an assembly marker. Returns true if a match is found; otherwise, false.

member.name: T:Splat.IModeDetector
member.summary: Detects if unit tests or design mode are currently running for the current application or library.

member.name: M:Splat.IModeDetector.InUnitTestRunner
member.summary: Gets a value indicating whether the current library or application is running through a unit test.
member.returns: If we are currently running in a unit test.

member.name: T:Splat.ModeDetection.Mode
member.summary: The default implementation of the and mode.

member.name: F:Splat.ModeDetection.Mode.Run
member.summary: The default implementation of the run mode.

member.name: F:Splat.ModeDetection.Mode.Test
member.summary: The default implementation of the test mode.

member.name: T:Splat.ModeDetector
member.summary: A helper class which detects if we are currently running via a unit test or design mode.

member.name: M:Splat.ModeDetector.#cctor
member.summary: Initializes static members of the class.

member.name: P:Splat.ModeDetector.Current
member.summary: Gets or sets the current mode detector set.

member.name: M:Splat.ModeDetector.OverrideModeDetector(Splat.IModeDetector)
member.summary: Overrides the mode detector with one of your own provided ones.
member.param: The mode detector to use.

member.name: M:Splat.ModeDetector.InUnitTestRunner
member.summary: Gets a value indicating whether we are currently running from a unit test.
member.returns: If we are currently running from a unit test.

member.name: T:Splat.FuncDependencyResolver
member.summary: A simple dependency resolver which takes Funcs for all its actions. GetService is always implemented via GetServices().LastOrDefault(). This container is not thread safe.
member.remarks: Initializes a new instance of the class.
member.param: A func which will return all the services contained for the specified service type and contract.
A func which will be called when a service type and contract are registered.
A func which will unregister the current registered element for a service type and contract.
A func which will unregister all the registered elements for a service type and contract.
A optional disposable which is called when this resolver is disposed.

member.name: M:Splat.FuncDependencyResolver.#ctor(System.Func{System.Type,System.String,System.Collections.Generic.IEnumerable{System.Object}},System.Action{System.Func{System.Object},System.Type,System.String},System.Action{System.Type,System.String},System.Action{System.Type,System.String},System.IDisposable)
member.summary: A simple dependency resolver which takes Funcs for all its actions. GetService is always implemented via GetServices().LastOrDefault(). This container is not thread safe.
member.remarks: Initializes a new instance of the class.
member.param: A func which will return all the services contained for the specified service type and contract.
A func which will be called when a service type and contract are registered.
A func which will unregister the current registered element for a service type and contract.
A func which will unregister all the registered elements for a service type and contract.
A optional disposable which is called when this resolver is disposed.

member.name: M:Splat.FuncDependencyResolver.Dispose(System.Boolean)
member.summary: Disposes of all managed memory from this class.
member.param: If we are currently disposing managed resources.

member.name: T:Splat.Locator
member.summary: A Locator which will host the container for dependency injection based operations. This is now a wrapper around which is the actual implementation. The static constructor also ensures that Splat registrations are done which is the key addition compared with AppLocator.

member.name: P:Splat.Locator.Current
member.summary: Gets the read only dependency resolver. This class is used throughout libraries for many internal operations as well as for general use by applications. If this isn't assigned on startup, a default, highly capable implementation will be used, and it is advised for most people to simply use the default implementation.

member.name: P:Splat.Locator.CurrentMutable
member.summary: Gets the mutable dependency resolver. The default resolver is also a mutable resolver, so this will be non-null. Use this to register new types on startup if you are using the default resolver.

member.name: M:Splat.Locator.SetLocator(Splat.IDependencyResolver)
member.summary: Allows setting the dependency resolver.
member.param: The dependency resolver to set.

member.name: M:Splat.Locator.GetLocator
member.summary: Gets the full locator. Note you should use or in most situations.
member.returns: The locator.

member.name: M:Splat.Locator.RegisterResolverCallbackChanged(System.Action)
member.summary: This method allows libraries to register themselves to be set up whenever the dependency resolver changes. Applications should avoid this method, it is usually used for libraries that depend on service location.
member.param: A callback that is invoked when the resolver is changed. This callback is also invoked immediately, to configure the current resolver.
member.returns: When disposed, removes the callback. You probably can ignore this.

member.name: M:Splat.Locator.SuppressResolverCallbackChangedNotifications
member.summary: This method will prevent resolver changed notifications from happening until the returned is disposed.
member.returns: A disposable which when disposed will indicate the change notification is no longer needed.

member.name: M:Splat.Locator.AreResolverCallbackChangedNotificationsEnabled
member.summary: Indicates if the we are notifying external classes of updates to the resolver being changed.
member.returns: A value indicating whether the notifications are happening.

member.name: T:Splat.ServiceLocationInitialization
member.summary: Initialization logic for Splat interacting with Dependency Resolvers.

member.name: M:Splat.ServiceLocationInitialization.InitializeSplat(Splat.IMutableDependencyResolver)
member.summary: Registers all the default registrations that are needed by the Splat module.
member.param: The resolver to register the needed service types against.

member.name: T:Splat.TargetFrameworkExtensions
member.summary: Extension methods that help to get the target framework for an assembly.

member.name: M:Splat.TargetFrameworkExtensions.GetTargetFrameworkName(System.Reflection.Assembly)
member.summary: Gets the target framework for an assembly.
member.param: The assembly to get the target framework for.
member.returns: The target framework or null if not known.
